name: Update Score
desc: Updates a single scoreboard entry (add, remove, or change score value).

implementation.overview: S3C updates a single scoreboard entry. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S3CPacketUpdateScore)
modules.purpose: Server sends S3CPacketUpdateScore to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
